datasets.name: Jake Athletic & Academic Profile
datasets.source: Direct intake from Jake and family — position, measurables (height, weight, 40 time, vertical, bench), GPA, graduation year, standardized test scores, intended major, current offer status, camp attendance history

datasets.name: NCAA Contact Rule Calendar — D1/D2/D3 by Grade Level
datasets.source: NCAA.org official legislative database, NCAA Division I Manual (Bylaw 13), Division II Manual, Division III Manual — machine-readable dead periods, quiet periods, evaluation periods, and contact periods as date ranges by division and recruit class year for 2025-2027 cycles

datasets.name: Target School & Coach Contact Database
datasets.source: Manual seed from Jake/family target list; enriched via program websites, staff directories, and 247Sports/On3 coaching staff pages — institution, division, position coach name, recruiting coordinator, email format pattern, Twitter/X handle, prior interaction history

datasets.name: Infrastructure Cost Model & API Burn Estimates
datasets.source: Anthropic pricing page, Supabase pricing page, Vercel pricing page, Resend pricing page, Twitter/X API developer portal — per-service monthly burn at projected call volumes with alert thresholds
datasets.size_estimate: < 10KB; 6-8 service entries with tiered volume scenarios

datasets.name: NCAA Social Media Interaction Ruleset
datasets.source: NCAA.org legislative database — bylaws governing athlete-initiated social media contact with coaches, permissible vs. impermissible interaction types (tagging, DMs, reposts, quote tweets) by division and contact period; NCAA social media guidance documents
datasets.format: Chunked text embeddings / vector store (pgvector in Supabase)

datasets.name: Program Fit Scoring Dimensions Dataset
datasets.source: Composite: depth chart data from 247Sports/On3/ESPN roster pages (manual or scraped), academic program availability from institution websites, geographic distance calculation from Jake's location, division realism benchmarks from recruiting profile comparables
datasets.format: JSON / Supabase table (program_fit_scores) with dimension columns: position_need_score, academic_match_score, geo_fit_score, composite_score
datasets.size_estimate: ~100KB; one scored record per target program, refreshed weekly
datasets.cost: free (manual assembly) or ~$20/month if On3/247Sports structured data feed required

datasets.name: Coach Outreach Template Library
datasets.source: Coach Outreach Studio generated content — initial introduction templates, film share messages, follow-up cadence sequences, D1/D2/D3 tone variants, reviewed against Shield compliance brief; stored for RAG retrieval during daily outreach drafting
datasets.format: Chunked text embeddings / vector store (pgvector in Supabase); raw templates also stored as Supabase table (outreach_templates)
datasets.size_estimate: ~150KB source text; ~400 embedded chunks across 30-50 template variants

datasets.name: Hudl Asset Inventory
datasets.source: Jake's Hudl account — clip titles, upload dates, view counts, public share link URLs, highlight reel version history, and embed codes; gathered via Hudl web interface if API access is unavailable to non-institutional users
datasets.format: JSON / Supabase table (film_assets) with embed_url, clip_title, upload_date, view_count, reel_version
datasets.cost: free (Hudl account assumed existing); $0 if embed fallback; TBD if Hudl API partnership required

datasets.name: X/Twitter Recruiting Content Corpus & Calendar
datasets.source: X Growth Studio generated templates — milestone announcement formats, film drop post patterns, coach-tag conventions, recruiting community norms sourced from comparable recruit accounts and recruiting Twitter community observation (2024-2025 cycle)
datasets.format: Chunked text embeddings / vector store (pgvector in Supabase); structured content calendar as Supabase table (content_calendar)
datasets.size_estimate: ~100KB source text; ~300 embedded post templates and calendar entries

datasets.name: Recruiting Pipeline Baseline (CRM Seed State)
datasets.source: Intake from Jake and family — any existing coach interest signals, camp invitations received, unofficial visit history, informal offers, prior email or social media contact with coaching staffs; imported as CRM initial state before any automated outreach begins
datasets.format: JSON / Supabase tables (pipeline_stages, coach_interactions) with stage enum: [identified, contacted, film_shared, responded, visit_scheduled, offer_extended]
datasets.size_estimate: ~50KB; variable by prior activity; likely 0-20 historical interaction records

datasets.name: Competitor Platform Teardown — Workflow & Friction Analysis
datasets.source: Community research: NCSA, BeRecruited, Athlete1, On3 recruit profiles — user reviews (Reddit r/CFB, r/sportsrecruiting, Twitter), product walkthrough documentation, App Store/Play Store reviews; synthesized into friction map and feature gap analysis
datasets.format: Chunked text embeddings / vector store (pgvector in Supabase); summary teardown document in filesystem

datasets.name: Family Oversight Requirements & Notification Preferences
datasets.source: Direct intake from Jake's family — preferred visibility format (dashboard view, email digest, SMS summary), reporting frequency, notification thresholds for offer signals, compliance risk events, and pipeline milestone changes
datasets.format: JSON / Supabase table (family_prefs) with fields: preferred_format, digest_frequency, alert_triggers[], timezone

external_apis.name: Anthropic Claude API
external_apis.purpose: AI-assisted outreach drafting, program fit scoring queries, daily brief summarization, and compliance rule interpretation across all agent workflows
external_apis.cost: Estimated $80-150/month at projected operating volume — claude-sonnet-4-6 at ~$0.08-0.10/run for 6 agents; claude-haiku-4-5 at ~$0.02/run for Ledger; daily operating cadence with prompt batching and response caching to hold under $150/month ceiling

external_apis.name: Supabase (Postgres + pgvector + Auth + Storage)
external_apis.purpose: Primary data persistence layer for all structured CRM tables, NCAA calendar data, pipeline stages, film asset inventory, and vector store for RAG retrieval across all agents
external_apis.cost: Free tier (500MB DB, 2GB bandwidth) sufficient for first 90 days; Pro tier at $25/month if volume exceeds free thresholds — budget assumption: $0-25/month

external_apis.name: Twitter/X API v2
external_apis.purpose: Post scheduling for recruiting content calendar, mention and coach-tag monitoring, profile analytics tracking for Jake's recruiting visibility campaigns
external_apis.cost: Basic tier: $100/month — covers 10K posts/month write access and basic analytics; this is the confirmed budget assumption pending Ledger validation

external_apis.name: Vercel
external_apis.purpose: Next.js deployment for recruiting dashboard and daily brief surface; CI/CD pipeline for Atlas-managed frontend
external_apis.cost: Hobby tier: free (sufficient for single-athlete internal tool); Pro tier at $20/month only if preview deployments or team collaboration features are required — budget assumption: $0/month

external_apis.name: Resend
external_apis.purpose: Transactional email delivery for coach outreach sequences and family digest notifications; chosen for developer-friendly API and lower cost structure vs. Postmark
external_apis.cost: Free tier: 100 emails/day; Pro tier: $20/month for 10K emails/month — budget assumption: $0-20/month
